epub_parser.no_text_extracted: No text content could be extracted from this EPUB.
epub_parser.uncompressed_too_large: This EPUB file declares an abnormally large uncompressed content ({size_mb} MB, limit: {max_mb} MB) and was rejected as a precaution: it is most likely a corrupted or booby-trapped file, not a real book.

pdf_parser.no_text_extracted: No text could be extracted from this PDF (it may be a scan without OCR).

gemini_errors.daily_quota_exceeded: The daily Gemini request quota is exhausted for today. It resets at midnight Pacific Time (California). (error 429: daily quota exceeded)
gemini_errors.rate_quota_exceeded: The Gemini quota (requests or tokens per minute) is temporarily exceeded. Try again in a few moments by clicking Summarize again. (error 429: per-minute quota exceeded)
gemini_errors.service_unavailable: The Gemini service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a few moments by clicking Summarize again. (error 503)
gemini_errors.internal_server_error: The Gemini service encountered an internal error. Try again in a few moments by clicking Summarize again. (error 500)
gemini_errors.deadline_exceeded: The Gemini service took too long to respond. Try again in a few moments by clicking Summarize again. (error 504)
gemini_errors.invalid_api_key: The Gemini API key is invalid, expired, or lacks the necessary permissions. Check it via the API key button. (error 401/403)
gemini_errors.generic_api_error: An error occurred while communicating with the Gemini API{status_part}: {error}
gemini_errors.blocked_by_safety_filters: Gemini did not produce a usable response, likely blocked by its safety filters (book content flagged as sensitive). A new attempt is not possible for this request.
gemini_errors.empty_response: Empty response received from the Gemini API.
gemini_errors.invalid_prompt_placeholder: The custom prompt "{prompt_label}" contains an error: the placeholder {error} is not recognized. Check its spelling in the Prompts window ("Reset this prompt" button if needed).
gemini_errors.truncated_response: Gemini's response was cut off mid-generation because it was too long (the model's length limit was reached): the content received is incomplete and unusable.
gemini_errors.unexpected_response_shape: The Gemini response does not have the expected shape (unusable JSON root).
gemini_errors.no_usable_summary: The Gemini response does not contain a usable summary.

gemini_progress.counting_tokens: Counting tokens of the extracted text…
gemini_progress.single_request: The book fits in a single request ({token_count} tokens). Generating…
gemini_progress.book_too_large: Book too large ({token_count} tokens). Splitting into {batch_count} chapter batch(es) ({chapter_count} chapters in total)…
gemini_progress.merging_summaries: Summaries merged. Identifying characters and writing the analysis…

worker_errors.book_locked_elsewhere: This book is already being generated in another Distillat window. Wait for it to finish before starting this book again here.

license_dialog.file_not_found:
License file not found ({license_path}).

This software is distributed under the GNU GPL v3 license: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.txt

extra_text_dialog.explanation: Gemini produced this text in addition to the content used for the report. It may be a pointless repetition or legitimate content: check it and copy/paste anything you find useful.

quota_help_dialog.intro: Distillat uses Gemini, Google's artificial intelligence, to read your book and write its summary. This access is free, but Google enforces usage limits on this free service, called "quotas".
quota_help_dialog.requests_body: Every time Distillat sends text to Gemini to be summarized, it counts as one "request". A small book only needs a single request. A larger book is split into several pieces ("batches"), each sent as its own request, followed by one final request that gathers everything into a complete report. That's why you may see a status like "Batch 2 of 3" during generation: it simply indicates which part of the book is currently being processed.
quota_help_dialog.failures_body: Two possible reasons: the quota has been reached (Google limits how many requests you can make per minute and per day; you then need to wait a few minutes for the per-minute limit, or until the next day for the daily limit, which resets every night), or the service is temporarily overloaded (Gemini can sometimes become briefly unavailable due to high demand from all its users; trying again a few minutes later is usually enough).
quota_help_dialog.resume_body: If a generation stops partway through, Distillat keeps the work already done. The next time you start the application, a window lets you resume that book directly; generation then automatically continues where it left off, without starting over.

profiles_dialog.list_info: Each profile corresponds to a distinct Gemini API key. On startup, the application automatically picks the first profile not already in use by another Distillat instance running on this computer.
profiles_dialog.info: Get your free key on Google AI Studio. It will be stored encrypted via the Windows Credential Manager - do not share it.
profiles_dialog.account_warning: ⚠️ The link opens your browser on whichever Google account is currently signed in by default: if you want a key for a different Google account, sign out first (or open the link in a private/incognito window).
profiles_dialog.warning: ⚠️ Never click "Enable billing": you would lose Gemini's free tier.
profiles_dialog.missing_fields_message: Please enter a valid name and API key.
profiles_dialog.duplicate_name_message: A profile named "{name}" already exists. Choose a different name.
profiles_dialog.duplicate_key_message: This API key is already registered under the profile "{name}". The same key cannot be used by two different profiles.
profiles_dialog.save_error_message: Could not save the API key: the Windows Credential Manager is unavailable.
profiles_dialog.delete_confirm_message: Permanently delete the profile "{name}" and its saved API key?
profiles_dialog.locked_message: The profile "{name}" is currently in use by another Distillat window open on this computer.
profiles_dialog.in_use_generation_message: Cannot delete the profile "{name}": a generation is currently running with this profile in this window. Wait for it to finish before deleting it.
profiles_dialog.switch_during_generation_message: Cannot switch the active profile: a generation is currently running with the current profile in this window. Wait for it to finish before switching profiles.

quota_limits_dialog.info: Google does not publish these limits via the API. Check your own limits at aistudio.google.com/rate-limit (for this exact model) and adjust them here if they differ from what's shown in the application.
quota_limits_dialog.save_error_message: Could not save the quota limits: {error}
quota_limits_dialog.no_profile_message: Quota limits are specific to each API key profile. Select or create a profile first via the "Profiles" button.

prompts_dialog.warning: ⚠️ These prompts directly drive report generation and work as-is. Editing them may cause generation to fail or produce inconsistent results (unusable output, response not recognized by the application, etc.): edit them at your own risk. The portions between curly braces, e.g. {book_title} or {full_text}, are automatically substituted by the application: do not remove them or change their spelling, or you will cause an error.
prompts_dialog.no_profile_message: Custom prompts are specific to each API key profile. Select or create a profile first via the "Profiles" button.

full_report.title: Summary + characters + analysis
full_report.explanation: Most common case: the whole book fits in a single request. This prompt asks in one go for the short summary, the detailed summary, the characters, and the literary analysis.

chapter_summary.title: 1. Summary of a chapter batch
chapter_summary.explanation: Case of a book too large to fit in a single request: first prompt of the splitting process. The book is split into batches of several consecutive chapters (as many as possible at once depending on the book's size), to limit the number of requests sent to the API (the free daily quota is very tight). This prompt receives one batch and must summarize each chapter of the batch separately.

consolidation.title: 2. Merge summary + characters + analysis
consolidation.explanation: Still in the case of a split book: once every batch has been summarized separately, this prompt receives all the chapter summaries (never the full text) and produces, in a single pass, the short summary, the detailed summary, the characters, and the literary analysis of the whole book.

drop_zone.prompt:
Drag and drop an EPUB, PDF file or a .distillat.json report here
or click to browse
drop_zone.busy:
Summarizing...
Drag and drop a new file once finished
drop_zone.file_dialog_title: Choose an EPUB, PDF file or a report

pending_resumes_dialog.intro: One or more previous generations stopped before completion. Select a book below to resume its generation from where it stopped, or close this window to decide later (it will reappear on next startup as long as a book is still waiting).

main_window.window_title: Distillat v{version} - Book summaries with Gemini
main_window.max_instances_message: {max_instances} instances of Distillat are already open on this computer. Close one before opening a new one.
main_window.new_instance_error_message: Could not launch a new Distillat instance: {error}
main_window.output_language_hint: Reports are generated in English: this setting also determines the language of the summaries produced by Gemini.
main_window.update_banner: 🆕 A new version of Distillat is available (v{version}), click to download it
main_window.extra_text_label: ℹ️ Extra content generated by Gemini was ignored, click to view it
main_window.quota_disclaimer: These counters are local estimates for this application only. They will be inaccurate if the same API key is also used elsewhere at the same time.
main_window.footer_button: Copyright 2026 Bruno Aublet - GNU GPL v3 license
main_window.set_cover_invalid_image: This file is not a valid image.
main_window.summary_placeholder: The short summary will appear here after processing.
main_window.detailed_summary_placeholder: The detailed summary will appear here after processing.
main_window.characters_placeholder: The main characters will appear here after processing.
main_window.analysis_placeholder: The literary analysis will appear here after processing.
main_window.no_detailed_summary: No detailed summary available for this report.
main_window.idle_status: Waiting for a book to summarize.
main_window.quota_display:
Tokens - input: {input_tokens} · output: {output_tokens} · total: {total_tokens}
Requests/minute: {rpm}/{rpm_limit} · Tokens/minute: {tpm}/{tpm_limit} · Requests/day: {rpd}/{rpd_limit}{in_flight_suffix}
main_window.mode_single: Summary produced in a single request.
main_window.quota_exceeded_warning: 🚫 Gemini quota exceeded, the app can no longer make requests for now. Try again later (the per-minute quota resets in 60 s, the daily quota at midnight Pacific Time).
main_window.resume_wait_hint_daily: It's the DAILY quota (number of requests/day) that is exhausted: it only resets at midnight Pacific Time (California), so you'll need to wait before resuming. Once that time has passed,
main_window.resume_wait_hint_minute: It's the PER-MINUTE quota (requests or tokens/minute) that is temporarily exceeded: it generally clears itself in under 2 minutes. Once that time has passed,
main_window.resume_wait_hint_other: This isn't a quota issue, it's probably a one-off generation glitch. You can try again right away,
main_window.resume_hint_suffix: Nothing is lost: the {batches_done}/{batches_total} chapter batch(es) already summarized successfully have been saved. {wait_hint}drag and drop this same EPUB/PDF file again and click "Summarize": Distillat will automatically recognize where processing had stopped and offer to resume from exactly that point, without redoing work already done.

unsaved_report_dialog.text: The current report has not been saved. Do you want to continue without saving?
unsaved_report_dialog.save_button: No: save and close the report

abort_generation_dialog.text:
A generation is in progress. Do you really want to quit?
The report being generated will be lost (Gemini quota already consumed will not be refunded).
